module_context.name: Triage Engine
module_context.description: Core clinical decision logic module - conducts symptom interviews through the interviewer service and applies triage rules through the rule engine to determine patient urgency and care recommendations
module_context.safety_class_rationale: Module that can contribute to hazardous situations through incorrect triage recommendations. Combines interview data collection with rule-based clinical decision support. Incorrect symptom collection or rule evaluation could lead to delayed care or inappropriate urgency levels, but clinical decisions still involve practitioner review.

software_items.name: interviewer4
software_items.description: Interview and questionnaire service responsible for collecting patient symptoms through guided questionnaires, executing branching logic, and managing interview state and answers

software_items.name: rule-engine-module
software_items.description: Generic rule engine that evaluates clinical triage rules to determine patient urgency, care recommendations, and appointment prioritization

core_functionalities.name: Symptom Interview Conduct
core_functionalities.description: Guides patients through structured questionnaires to collect symptom data, medical history, and clinical context

core_functionalities.name: Interview State Management
core_functionalities.description: Maintains interview progress, answers, and state across sessions including locking and expiration

core_functionalities.name: External Data Integration
core_functionalities.description: Imports patient medical history from HealthData service for clinical context

core_functionalities.name: Clinical Rule Evaluation
core_functionalities.description: Evaluates declarative triage rules against patient attributes to determine urgency and care recommendations

core_functionalities.name: Rule Package Management
core_functionalities.description: Loads, validates, and updates clinical rule packages from object storage

core_functionalities.name: Interview to Rule Engine Data Transfer
core_functionalities.description: Exports completed interview data to rule engine for triage decision

module_hazards.description: Interview flow logic error causes critical questions to be skipped
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient fails to report critical symptoms leading to incorrect triage level or missed urgent conditions
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Incomplete interview data passed to rule engine produces incorrect recommendations

module_hazards.description: Patient answers lost or corrupted during save
module_hazards.potential_harm: Clinical data loss results in incomplete patient assessment and potentially unsafe triage decisions
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Missing answers cause rule engine to produce recommendations based on incomplete data

module_hazards.description: Interview data passed to rule engine is incomplete or malformed
module_hazards.potential_harm: Rule engine receives incomplete data and produces incorrect triage recommendation
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Primary cross-item hazard - data integrity between interview and rule engine is critical

module_hazards.description: Rule condition evaluates incorrectly due to expression error
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient receives incorrect triage recommendation leading to delayed care or unnecessary escalation
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Affects all patients processed by the affected rule

module_hazards.description: Clinical rule packages fail to load or update
module_hazards.potential_harm: System operates with outdated or missing triage rules, potentially providing obsolete clinical guidance
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Affects all patients until rules are restored

module_hazards.description: Rules execute in incorrect order overriding critical decisions
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient receives conflicting or incorrect care recommendation as critical rules are overridden
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Systemic issue affecting rule package interaction

module_hazards.description: External medical history unavailable for interview
module_hazards.potential_harm: Interview proceeds without patient's medication/condition history, leading to incomplete assessment
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Affects interview quality and downstream rule evaluation

module_hazards.description: Unauthorized access to patient interview data
module_hazards.potential_harm: Privacy breach, GDPR violation, or malicious actor views/modifies patient health data

failure_modes.name: Questionnaire executor state machine failure
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Interview cannot proceed, patient stuck or receives irrelevant questions
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient cannot complete triage, incomplete data affects downstream services

failure_modes.name: Answer persistence transaction rollback
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Answer not saved, patient sees previous answer or error

failure_modes.name: Answer filtering algorithm removes valid answers
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Valid patient answers removed from answer list
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Incomplete data passed to rule engine, potential under-triage

failure_modes.name: Concurrent interview modification race condition
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Lost updates or inconsistent state between concurrent accesses
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient or practitioner sees stale data

failure_modes.name: Interview expiration during active session
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Interview marked expired while patient actively answering
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient forced to restart, progress lost

failure_modes.name: External health data service unavailable
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Import data fails, interview may fail or proceed without medical history
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Interview lacks clinical context, affects rule evaluation

failure_modes.name: Expression evaluation exception during rule condition check
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage process interrupted, no recommendation produced

failure_modes.name: Mandatory attribute validation failure
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Rule engine cannot execute, no output produced
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage cannot proceed, patient redirected to manual triage

failure_modes.name: Object storage unavailable during rule loading
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Rule repository initialization fails, service cannot start
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage service unavailable, all patients must use fallback path

failure_modes.name: Rule package YAML parsing failure
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Specific rule package not loaded, functionality unavailable
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Affected partners/functions unavailable until fix deployed

failure_modes.name: Interview result serialization failure
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Interview data cannot be exported to rule engine
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Triage cannot complete, patient must restart or use manual triage

module_risk_controls.description: Answer timestamp and index-based ordering ensures chronological consistency
module_risk_controls.implementation: Answer entities have auto-generated indices and timestamps for deterministic ordering

module_risk_controls.description: Database transaction management ensures atomic answer saves
module_risk_controls.implementation: Spring @Transactional annotations ensure atomic saves with rollback on exception

module_risk_controls.description: Interview access control enforces patient-practitioner relationship
module_risk_controls.implementation: JWT validation and role-based access control with @Secured annotations

module_risk_controls.description: Required import validation blocks interview without critical data
module_risk_controls.implementation: Throws IllegalStateException if required external data import fails

module_risk_controls.description: Mandatory attribute validation enforced at rule engine input
module_risk_controls.implementation: RuleEngine.assertInput() validates all mandatory attributes before execution

module_risk_controls.description: Expression syntax validation catches runtime evaluation errors
module_risk_controls.implementation: Try-catch in RuleEngine.when() converts ExecutionError to RuleEngineFaults with context

module_risk_controls.description: Rule package validation at load time
module_risk_controls.implementation: RuleVerifier validates rule syntax, duplicate IDs, type compatibility before deployment

module_risk_controls.description: Output validation after each rule execution
module_risk_controls.implementation: attributeRegistry.validate(output) called after each rule to ensure consistency

module_risk_controls.description: Metrics and monitoring for rule execution failures
module_risk_controls.implementation: Micrometer metrics for load failures and execution errors
JMS events published for interview lifecycle for audit trail

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Clinical validation of questionnaire content and branching logic
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software validates syntax but cannot assess clinical appropriateness of questions or triage rules

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: System-level monitoring for interview completion and failure patterns
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Module-level logging exists but system aggregation needed to detect patterns

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: End-to-end data integrity validation between interview and rule engine
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Module boundaries prevent cross-service validation at component level

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Graceful degradation when rule engine unavailable
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Module throws exceptions but system must implement fallback triage path

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Practitioner training on rule engine limitations and manual triage procedures
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software cannot ensure practitioners understand automated triage limitations

cross_item_interfaces.name: Interview Result Export to Rule Engine
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: CRITICAL: Primary data flow for triage decision. Malformed or incomplete data causes incorrect triage level.
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: InterviewResult containing patient answers, symptoms, medical history
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Serialization errors logged, rule engine receives data and validates mandatory attributes

cross_item_interfaces.name: Object Storage for Rule Packages
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Rule packages loaded from object storage. Failure prevents rule updates or service startup.
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: YAML rule package definitions, attribute schemas
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Automatic retry via ObjectStorageRetryingRestClient, service fails to start if persistent

cross_item_interfaces.name: HealthData Import
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Medical history import for interview context. Failure means interview proceeds without critical patient data.
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Required imports fail fast, optional imports logged and skipped

cross_item_interfaces.name: JMS Interview Events
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Interview lifecycle events for downstream services and audit. Failure delays notifications.
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: Interview created, answered, locked, cancelled events
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Artemis built-in redelivery, DLQ for poison messages

module_verification_gaps.description: No integration test verifying interview result data integrity when exported to rule engine
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add end-to-end test that creates interview, answers questions, locks, exports, and validates rule engine receives complete data

module_verification_gaps.description: Rule package ordering and interaction testing incomplete
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests verifying rule package interaction with clinical review of outcomes

module_verification_gaps.description: No test for database transaction rollback during answer save
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test simulating transaction failure and verify rollback leaves interview consistent

module_verification_gaps.description: HealthData service failure handling not fully tested
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add integration tests with mock HealthData returning errors

module_verification_gaps.description: Object storage failure and recovery scenarios not tested with actual remote storage
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add fault injection tests for ObjectStorageClient failures

aggregation_summary.notes: The primary safety concern is data integrity between interviewer4 and rule-engine-module. The InterviewResult export is the critical integration point that requires end-to-end validation.
